title: Emotional Hostages
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Emotional Hostages''''' was a compilation album by [[Annadale Fayde]] that was given a Scarlet rating by the [[Imperial Board of Culture]]. The album's title track later appeared on her album ''[[Darkness on the Land]]''.

==Track listing==
*"[[Burning Bridges]]"
*"[[Cybernetic Love Affair]]"
*"[[Emotional Hostages (song)|Emotional Hostages]]"
*"[[Running in the Dark]]"

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-05-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''
